title: Greedy Algorithms
subtitle: Pick the best local choice. Hope it works.

sections.heading: The greedy mindset
sections.body: A **greedy algorithm** makes the choice that looks best **right now**, without worrying about the future. For some problems, this works perfectly and is far simpler than exhaustive search. For others, it fails. Knowing when greedy works is the real skill.

sections.title: Making change with the fewest coins
sections.body: You owe 47 cents. Grab a quarter (25). Then 22 left — grab another quarter? No, 22 < 25. Grab a dime (10). 12 left. Another dime. 2 left. Two pennies. Done — six coins. Always grabbing the biggest coin you can: greedy.
